title: Manager Corruption
description: Risk of embezzlement from corrupt managers. Some managers may skim profits or make side deals. Higher corruption risk with lower oversight. Detection and consequences for corrupt managers.
definition-of-done: Manager corruption stat. Corruption leads to profit skimming. Detection mechanics for catching corruption. Consequences for corrupt managers.
testing-plan: Verify corruption stat exists. Test profit skimming mechanics. Verify detection works. Test consequence application.
